visual_description: In a dimly lit room, two men are positioned at a long desk filled with electronic equipment. The man on the left, wearing a light-colored collared shirt and headphones, sits at a laptop, looking intently at the screen. The man on the right, also in a light-colored shirt, stands beside him, looking down at his own laptop. The background is cluttered with papers taped to the wall, a camera on a tripod, and various other gadgets, suggesting a surveillance or communication operation. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner of the frame. The camera remains stationary, capturing the focused and serious atmosphere of the two men at work. A man speaks in a calm, focused, and authoritative tone, giving a clear command. His voice is steady and serious as he says, "电话和无线电波全部进入监听状态" (All phone and radio waves are now in listening mode). The background is filled with the ambient sounds of a technical workspace, including the soft, rhythmic clicking of laptop keys and the low hum of electronic equipment, creating a sense of quiet concentration and surveillance. The man on the right sits down at his laptop, which is positioned in front of a microphone on a boom arm.
